# MDLTextureFilter

**Class**

A description of filtering modes for a renderer to use when sampling from a texture.

## Declaration

```swift
class MDLTextureFilter
```

## Overview

A texture filter, together with a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTexture] object and transform information, form a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureSampler] object, which describes a texture and its rendering parameters for use in rendering one aspect of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMaterial] object’s surface appearance.

## Managing Texture Coordinate Wrap Modes

- **sWrapMode**: The coordinate wrapping mode for texture t-coordinates.
- **tWrapMode**: The coordinate wrapping mode for texture t-coordinates.
- **rWrapMode**: The coordinate wrapping mode for texture r-coordinates.

## Managing Texture Filter Modes

- **minFilter**: The filter mode for rendering textures at sizes smaller than that of the original image.
- **magFilter**: The filter mode for rendering textures at sizes larger than that of the original image.
- **mipFilter**: The filter mode for rendering textures using mipmapping.

## Constants

- **MDLMaterialTextureWrapMode**: Modes for sampling textures at coordinates outside the texture bounds, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/sWrapMode], [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/tWrapMode], and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/rWrapMode] properties.
- **MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode**: Modes for sampling textures at coordinates between texels, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/minFilter] and [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/magFilter] properties.
- **MDLMaterialMipMapFilterMode**: Modes for sampling textures at sizes between mipmap levels, used by the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureFilter/mipFilter] property.

## Textures

- **MDLTexture**: A source of texel data to be used in rendering material surface appearances.
- **MDLCheckerboardTexture**: A generator of texel data that creates a checkerboard pattern with two specified colors.
- **MDLColorSwatchTexture**: A generator of texel data that creates a gradient between two specified colors.
- **MDLNoiseTexture**: A generator of texel data that creates a field of random noise.
- **MDLNormalMapTexture**: A generator of texel data that computes a normal map from a supplied texture.
- **MDLSkyCubeTexture**: A generator of texel data that creates cube textures using a physically realistic simulation of the sunlit sky.
- **MDLURLTexture**: A lightweight reference to a URL from which to load texture data.
- **MDLTextureSampler**: An object that pairs a source of texture data with sampling parameters to be used in rendering the texture.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
